name: Crucible Extension
desc_clean: Umbra 2 The number of Morsels within the Crucible seems to be endless, making the work they accomplish proceed near instantaneously.

Morsel.definition_short: Mała jednostka-jedzenie zjadana przez Gorge units.

Endless.definition_short: Jednostka wraca do ręki po śmierci.

mechanic_summary: Crucible Extension to Spell klanu Umbra. Umbra 2 The number of Morsels within the Crucible seems to be endless, making the work they accomplish proceed near instantaneously. Keywords: Morsel, Endless.
wiki_desc: Umbra 2 The number of Morsels within the Crucible seems to be endless, making the work they accomplish proceed near instantaneously. Should I need to do future work on the Boneshaker, I will remember to take this into account.
